query:
SELECT sb.id, sb.planId, dp.date, sb.blockType, sb.title, sb.description, sb.durationMin
FROM scheduleBlocks sb
JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = sb.planId
WHERE sb.subjectId = 60002
ORDER BY dp.date, sb.sortOrder;
